# sapbtp_cicd_credential (Data Source)

Reads credential from the SAP BTP CI/CD service. The password is never returned by the API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sapbtp_cicd_credential" "example" {
  name = "my-deploy-user"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the credential. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Name of the credential. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the credential.
- `username` (String) Username for basic authentication.
